weapons.name: Dark gate
weapons.abilities: Ammo(1), AT(4), Barrage, Units hit must pass a Strength test or suffer three Mortal Wounds.

weapons.name: Electrocorrosive whip
weapons.abilities: Poison(3+), All models that were hit half their Strength until the bearers next activation.

weapons.name: Ichor injectorᶜᵒ
weapons.abilities: Extra attack, For each successful hit roll with this weapon, the target must pass a Toughness test. If the test fails, the model dies immediately. Doesn't work against vehicles.

weapons.name: Orb of despair
weapons.abilities: Ammo(1), Explosive, To wound rolls are rolled against the target's Leadership value

weapons.name: Razorflailsᶜᵘ
weapons.abilities: Re-roll to hit and to wound rolls

weapons.name: Shardnet and impalerᶜᵘ
weapons.abilities: Enemy models in base contact reduce their Attacks by 1 (minimum 1)

equipment.name: A league apartᶜᵘ
equipment.desc: If the Initiative value of the Succubus is higher than that of any enemy in direct base contact, she gets +2 Attacks. Unique.

equipment.name: Animus Vitaeᶜᵒ
equipment.desc: If the wearer eliminated an enemy model during their activation, they gain an additional "Power through Pain" token. Unique.

equipment.name: Archangel of Pain
equipment.desc: One enemy unit within 12" must pass a Leadership test or have WS 6+ and Initiative 1 until the end of their next activation. Ammo(1). Unique.

equipment.name: Artefact of Commoragh
equipment.desc:
One weapon of the model gains one of the following:
- Additional +6" Range (only for ranged weapons)
- Additional +1 Strength
- Additional -1 AP
- Additional +1 AT
Every enhancement is unique per army. Can be taken multiple times.

equipment.name: Blood dancerᶜᵘ
equipment.desc: The model and its attached unit gain +2" charge range.

equipment.name: Clone field
equipment.desc: The bearer ignores the first two hits each game.

equipment.name: Crucible of Malediction
equipment.desc: All psykers within 12" must pass a Leadership test or be killed immediately. Ammo(1). Unique.

equipment.name: Crystal heart
equipment.desc: The bearer and an attached unit are immune to psychic powers. Unique.

equipment.name: Decapitator
equipment.desc: All melee attacks of the model gain the "Deadly(5+)" ability. Unique.

equipment.name: Executioner’s armour
equipment.desc: The model gains a 2+ save.

equipment.name: Farseer bones
equipment.desc: Once per game, after both players have rolled for Initiative, the bearer's roll can be increased by +2. Unique.

equipment.name: Ghostplate armor
equipment.desc: The bearer gains a 5+ invulnerability save.

equipment.name: Marksman honours
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Ballistic skill.

equipment.name: Master of Painᶜᵒ
equipment.desc: The model gains the "Narthecium" ability.

equipment.name: Master-crafted weapon
equipment.desc: The model may re-roll one to hit roll per activation. Must be purchased for each weapon seperately.

equipment.name: Realspace raiderᴷ
equipment.desc: All rolls for reserves are automatically successfull.

equipment.name: Shadow fieldᴷ
equipment.desc: The bearer got a 2+ invulnerability save. If the saving throw fails once, the Shadow field can't be used for the rest of the game. Unique.

equipment.name: Skybike
equipment.desc: The bearer gains +6" Movement, +1 Toughness, +1 Wound and the "Jetbike" ability.

equipment.name: Skyboard
equipment.desc: The bearer gains +6" Movement and the "Jump pack" ability.

equipment.name: Soul trap
equipment.desc: Everytime the bearer destroys an enemy character model or monstrous creature, they add the Strength value to their own for the rest of the game.

equipment.name: Stimulant supply
equipment.desc: The bearer may select an additional Combat drug.

equipment.name: Swordsman honours
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Weapon skill.

equipment.name: Teleport homing beacon
equipment.desc: A friendly unit arriving within 3" of the bearer via Deep strike does not scatter. The Teleport homer must be present on the table at the beginning of the battle round in order to be used.

equipment.name: Trophy
equipment.desc: Enemy units within a 6" radius suffer -1 to their Leadership.

equipment.name: Twilight shroud
equipment.desc: The model and its attached unit gain the "Stealth" abilities.

equipment.name: Vexator mask
equipment.desc: The model gains (cumulative) "Parry".

equipment.name: Adrenalight
equipment.desc: The unit gains +1 Attack.

equipment.name: Grave lotus
equipment.desc: The unit gains +1 Strength.

equipment.name: Hypex
equipment.desc: The unit automatically advances 6" instead of rolling for the distance.

equipment.name: Serpentin
equipment.desc: The unit gains +1 to hit rolls in melee.

equipment.name: Painbringer
equipment.desc: The unit gains +1 Toughness.

equipment.name: Splintermind
equipment.desc: The unit starts with a(n) (additional) "Power through Pain" token.

equipment.name: Additional armor
equipment.desc: The model ignores the first "Crew Shaken" vehicle damage each round.

equipment.name: Bladevanes
equipment.desc: The model gains the "Vector strike" ability and the following weapon: S:+1 AP:-2 D:1, Unwieldy.

equipment.name: Flickerfield
equipment.desc: The model gains a 5+ invulnerability save.

equipment.name: Improved targeting
equipment.desc: The model does not have to declare its ranged weapons at all targets before firing, and can choose a new target for each weapon.

equipment.name: Night shield
equipment.desc: Enemy models reduce their weapons range by 12" (to a minimum of 6"), if they target the bearer.

equipment.name: Smoke Launcher
equipment.desc:
The model can use its Smoke Launcher once per game:
- During normal activation, instead of firing weapons.
- If it has not yet carried out its order this round and is targeted by an enemy unit. The order is consumed by doing so.
Enemy units can only deal glancing hits with ranged attacks until the next activation.

equipment.name: Trophy
equipment.desc: Enemy units within a 6" radius suffer -1 to their Leadership.
